display_text: Book of Shadows, Cost: 0: Tier 3 Neutral item. Grants Night Vision (400). Its active, Shadows, targets an enemy, ally, or self, making them untargetable to enemies for 4 seconds, but also silences, mutes, and disarms them. Applies a Basic Dispel on cast. Stats: CD: 8s, Duration: 4s, Night Vision: 400.
